nasb.text: Your sons and your daughters shall be given to another people, while your eyes look on and yearn for them continually; but there will be nothing you can do.

esv.text: Your sons and your daughters shall be given to another people, while your eyes look on and fail with longing for them all day long, but you shall be helpless.

cnv.text: 你的兒女必被交給別國的民，你必親眼看見，日日為他們焦慮；你必無能為力。

ccb.text: 自己的儿女被外族人掳走，你们终日望眼欲穿，却无能为力。
